! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
stderr 'marshalJSON method Act must return a value to marshal, not only error'

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /api/x marshalJSON(Act(ctx))" -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.24
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Act(ctx context.Context) error { return nil }
